creator: einar@isnic.is
text:
freebsd has "DejaVuSans" set as the default sans font in the systemfonts tests (same as Linux).

It looks like your setup is pulling NimbusSans-Regular instead.

The tests are skipped on Linux and Solaris:

skip_on_os("linux") # Different fonts for different distros
skip_on_os("solaris") # Have no idea what it is supposed to give

Maybe we just need to skip these tests.
